name: sensations-tangling
prompt: Medium shot from waist up, androgynous figure with auburn hair positioned in LOWER HALF of frame. Green eyes wide with shock, amber warmth flooding into them. Expression of overwhelming realization. Silver rings on trembling hands. Warm auburn and amber energy swirling around. Corridor ceiling and walls visible in UPPER HALF of frame providing large empty space above head. Low camera angle looking slightly up. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, auburn amber color palette, high contrast, cel shading

bubble: Internal thought from Jace, close-up with space above head, place thought bubble in empty space TOP far above face
